story: Brent watched Vera drive off after their rift over belief. A royal-blue droplet bloomed on his locked screen: “Tonight, at dusk. Kerrigan’s Farm. Seeing is believing.” He hesitated, then decided to go. As she drove away, Vera reread the identical blue droplet and, after a long breath, chose to believe him. She drove to Kerrigan’s Farm to find Brent. At sunset Brent wound down the dirt lane toward the abandoned silo. The field held a scatter of cars and a multi-colored bus.
implausible_knowledge: As she drove away, Vera reread the identical blue droplet and, after a long breath, chose to believe him. She drove to Kerrigan’s Farm to find Brent.
question: When Brent steps out of his car at Kerrigan’s Farm and decides what to do first, what will he most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Wait Vera by the path to meet her, scanning the arriving cars to link up with her first.
answer_without_knowledge: Move into the field and fix his attention on the sky with the other believers, waiting for whatever appears.
